scripts.check: astro check && npm run functions:check && npm run tests:check
scripts.pages:dev: npm run build && wrangler pages dev dist
scripts.verify: npm run cf:types && npm run tests:check && npm run test:unit && npm run check
scripts.verify:deploy: npm run verify && npm run build
scripts.d1:migrations:list:preview: wrangler d1 migrations list brzytwa-barber-preview --remote --env preview
scripts.d1:migrations:apply:preview: wrangler d1 migrations apply brzytwa-barber-preview --remote --env preview
scripts.d1:migrations:list:production: wrangler d1 migrations list brzytwa-barber-production --remote --env production
scripts.d1:migrations:apply:production: wrangler d1 migrations apply brzytwa-barber-production --remote --env production
